project_identity: Standalone CUDA F-statistic DTV pilot detector and GNU Radio ATSC 1.0 testbench.

quality_checks.name: pilot_frequency_error
quality_checks.description: Absolute pilot frequency error from the expected ATSC pilot offset.

quality_checks.name: pilot_level
quality_checks.description: Measured ATSC pilot power below the estimated data shelf.

quality_checks.name: occupied_bandwidth
quality_checks.description: 99% occupied bandwidth inside the nominal 6 MHz channel.

quality_checks.name: shelf_flatness
quality_checks.description: 95th-to-5th percentile PSD spread over the interior data shelf.

quality_checks.name: edge_rolloff
quality_checks.description: Mean channel-edge PSD relative to the interior data shelf; more negative is better.

statistic.power_sum_rule: sum powers first, then form F; do not average F-statistics
statistic.corrected_pilot_excess_definition: rho_corrected = F/mu0 - 1; mu0 = 2*target_norm_sq/ref_norm_sum_sq (exact integer squared norms of the packed weight terms)
statistic.snr_shelf_definition: DTV data-shelf PSD relative to non-DTV noise floor

fixed_point_contract.k128_lock_reason: With signed 4-bit real/imaginary samples and weights, each real/imaginary dot-product component grows as 9 + log2(K) bits; K=128 is the largest power-of-two detector window that keeps the component accumulator inside signed int16.
fixed_point_contract.reference_offset_lock_reason: skipped_guard_bins=1 leaves one fine DFT bin between the target bin and nearest reference bin. This corresponds to reference_offset_bins=2.

mask_convention.definition: masked samples are excluded from averages; they are not zero-filled before averaging

detector_geometry.power_sum_rule: sum target/reference powers over all detector rows before forming F

truth.snr_shelf_definition: ATSC data-shelf power relative to non-DTV noise power integrated over dtv_bandwidth_hz; pilot power is excluded from the shelf truth.

detector_output.cpu_float_reference: Unquantized channelized detector rows with ideal complex DFT weights from the selected manifest layout.
detector_output.cpu_packed_reference: NumPy reference using packed int4 samples and packed int4 weights, useful for CPU/GPU fixed-point agreement checks.

csv_columns.requested_snr_shelf_db: Requested ATSC data-shelf SNR relative to non-DTV noise.
csv_columns.frequency_offset_hz: Baseband frequency offset applied before AWGN injection.
csv_columns.measured_truth_snr_shelf_db: Measured data-shelf truth from clean composite power, pilot/data correction, and realized in-band noise.
csv_columns.measured_truth_composite_atsc_snr_db: Measured clean composite ATSC IQ power over realized in-band noise.
csv_columns.estimated_snr_shelf_db: DTV shelf SNR inferred from pnr_bin_db.
csv_columns.cpu_float_estimated_snr_shelf_db: DTV shelf SNR from the unquantized CPU float reference.
csv_columns.cpu_fstat_raw: Packed NumPy CPU reference F-statistic for fixed-point CPU/GPU agreement diagnostics.
